name: Okta: Privileged Users without MFA (Indirect)
description: Users who do not have multi-factor authentication enabled and hold privileged role assignments through group membership.
query:
MATCH p = (u:Okta_User)-[:Okta_MemberOf]->(:Okta_Group)-[:Okta_HasRoleAssignment]->(:Okta_RoleAssignment)-[:Okta_ScopedTo]->(:Okta)
WHERE u.authenticationFactors = 0
RETURN p
LIMIT 1000
